title:
Case No. C771601525, SKA-23/2024. Decision of the Riga Regional Court of 8 December 2025. ECLI:LV:RAT:2025:1208.C771601525.6.L,

Latvia
text:
To leave the decision of the
judge of the Riga City Court of September 22, 2025, unchanged, but to dismiss
[person A]'s ancillary complaint.



The decision is not subject to
appeal.
